items.title: Pakistan Bus Crash
items.why_it_matters: A passenger bus traveling from Balochistan to Peshawar veered off the road into a ravine in the Dana Sar region of southwestern Pakistan, resulting in 40 fatalities and eight injuries. Initial reports suggest the vehicle may have been overcrowded and transporting passengers from a previously incapacitated vehicle. Rescue operations were deployed to the remote border area of Balochistan and Khyber Pakhtunkhwa provinces.
